message:
feat(fcp-host): record invoke budget usage from response metrics

Add record_invoke_budget_usage() that extracts usage metrics from
InvokeResponse, feeds them to BudgetPolicyEngine::record_usage(), and
logs warnings on Warn/Deny actions. Wire into both invoke_handler and
execute_batch_operation paths. Harden budget tests with sort_unstable
and additional cross-check assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
